Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Canada National Parks Act
Identification.ShortTitle: An Act to amend the Canada National Parks Act

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Canada National Parks Act to withdraw lands from Riding Mountain National Park of Canada and Pacific Rim National Park Reserve of Canada for the purposes of Indian reserves.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: Paragraph (10)(a) of the description of Riding Mountain National Park of Canada in Part 4 of Schedule 1 to the Canada National Parks Act is replaced by the following:

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: sections 5, 6, 7 and 8, the west half of section 4, the portion of the east half of section 4 lying west of Clear Lake Indian Reserve No. 61A and the southwest quarter of section 18;

Section.Text: The description of Pacific Rim National Park Reserve of Canada in Schedule 2 to the Act is amended by adding the following at the end of Part I:

Provision.Text: Thirdly: Parcel 1 and Village Connector Road, as shown on a plan recorded in the Canada Lands Surveys Records at Ottawa as 88700.

Section.MarginalNote: Order of the Governor in Council
Section.Text: The provisions of this Act come into force on a day or days to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council.
